subject: A young humanoid scholar in a brown academic robe, smiling, holding an open chained tome while conjuring a glowing blue circular magical glyph with their raised hand
description: A young humanoid figure stands in a warm indoor workshop, beaming with evident delight. They wear a brown layered robe with a wide collar and hold a large open tome attached to their wrist by a metal chain. Their right hand is raised, projecting a glowing blue magical sigil — a triangle inscribed within a circle — that hovers in the air beside them. The background is filled with large golden spherical mechanical apparatus and glasswork, suggesting an arcane laboratory or academy. The palette shifts from warm amber tones in the background to cool blue-white light from the conjured glyph. The expression and posture read as enthusiasm for study rather than combat.
foreground: Scholar in brown robe holding open tome, raised hand conjuring blue magical glyph, chain on wrist
background: Arcane laboratory interior with large golden spherical apparatus and glasswork
emotion: Delighted, enthusiastic — broad smile, relaxed posture, evident pride in craft
